en: fancy dress for it? I've got to make an impression darling.
You look like an
ko: 인상 좀 남겨야 해, 자기야. 넌 화난 도마뱀 같아.

en: angry lizard.
It's your best work.
Very subtle.
You're gonna fly away.
Can I borrow it for Sunday church?
So this is Queen and you must be Freddie Mercury.
ko: 자, 이게 퀸이고 넌 프레디 머큐리구나.

en: You've got a gift you all have.
So tell me what makes Queen any different from all of the other wannabe
ko: 퀸이 다른 록스타들과 다른 점이 뭐야?

en: rock stars I meet?
ko: 그건 바로 우리가 함께 어울리지 않는 네 명의 부적응자라는 거야.

en: I'll tell you what it is.
We're four misfits who don't belong
together playing to the other misfits.
ko: 방 한쪽 구석에 있는 아웃사이더들, 그들도 자신이 어울리지 않는다고 확신해.

en: The outcasts right at the back of the
room who are pretty sure they don't belong either.
We belong to them. We're a
ko: 우리는 가족이야. 하지만 우리 중 누구도 같지 않아.

en: family.
But no two of us the same.
Paul.
Paul Printer meet Queen.
